name: Docs Command Palette
description: Cmd+K search overlay for documentation navigation. Features fuzzy search, keyboard navigation (arrows, Enter, Escape), grouped results by section, and recent searches.

slots.overlay: Semi-transparent backdrop that closes on click
slots.container: Centered modal container with search input and results
slots.input: Search input with icon and Escape hint
slots.results: Scrollable list of grouped search results
slots.item: Individual result item with icon, title, and arrow indicator
